Package nonprofitbookkeeping.service

Class PreferencesService

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.service.PreferencesService
public class PreferencesService extends Object
Manages application preferences, such as default directories and last used files. Preferences are stored in a ".properties" file located in a ".nonprofitbookkeeping" directory within the user's home directory. This class uses static methods to provide global access to preference settings.

    Method
    Description

    Gets the default directory where company files are stored.

  • Method Details

    • getDefaultCompanyDir

      public static String getDefaultCompanyDir()
      Gets the default directory where company files are stored. If no default directory preference is set, it defaults to a "NonprofitBookkeeping" subdirectory within the user's home directory.
      Returns:
      The default company directory path as a String.

    • setDefaultCompanyDir

      public static void setDefaultCompanyDir(String path)
      Sets the default directory for company files and saves this preference.
      Parameters:
      path - The directory path to set as the default. If null, the behavior of Properties.setProperty(String, String) for null values will apply (may throw NPE).

    • getLastUsedCompanyFile

      public static String getLastUsedCompanyFile()
      Gets the path of the last used company file. If no last used file preference is set, it defaults to an empty string.
      Returns:
      The path of the last used company file as a String, or an empty string if not set.

    • setLastUsedCompanyFile

      public static void setLastUsedCompanyFile(String filePath)
      Sets the path of the last used company file and saves this preference.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The file path to set as the last used. If null, the behavior of Properties.setProperty(String, String) for null values will apply (may throw NPE).

    • getLastUsedCompanyId

      public static Long getLastUsedCompanyId()
      Returns the identifier of the last company that was opened, if available.
      Returns:
      the last used company id

    • setLastUsedCompanyId

      public static void setLastUsedCompanyId(Long companyId)
      Stores the identifier of the most recently opened company.
      Parameters:
      companyId - the new last used company id

    • getInstance

      public static PreferencesService getInstance()
      Gets the single instance of PreferencesService.
      Returns:
      single instance of PreferencesService
